share.cta: Track your sticker album in the app — it's free!
share.swapsHeadline: ⚽ World Cup 2026 — I have {{count}} duplicate stickers to swap!
share.signature:
Track your album at meualbum2026.app — it's free,
and you can swap dupes with friends on WhatsApp.
share.scanCta: Point your camera to open the app

milestone.albumSubline: Share the moment and keep collecting!

errors.offlineDesc: The app needs an internet connection the first time it opens. Connect and try again.
errors.catalogDesc: Please try again in a moment.
errors.authGeneric: Could not sign in. Please try again in a moment.
errors.authRateLimit: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.authBanned: This account cannot access the app.
errors.authInitFailed: Could not start sign-in. Reload the page.

notFound.title: This sticker isn't in the album.
notFound.subtitle: The link you opened doesn't exist — or it was mistyped. Head back home and keep building your collection.

serverError.title: Something broke on our side.
serverError.subtitle: Our glue came unstuck. Try reloading — if it keeps happening, we're on it.

feedback.exportFailed: Could not export the album. Please try again.
feedback.resetFailed: Could not reset the album. Check your connection.
feedback.importFailed: Could not import the album. Please try again.
feedback.restoreFailed: Could not restore the backup. Please try again.
feedback.stickerUpdateFailed: Could not save the sticker. Try again.
feedback.deleteAccountFailed: Could not delete your account. Try again or contact support.

consent.label: Analytics consent banner
consent.message: We use anonymous usage data to improve the app. No personally identifiable information is collected.

trade.invalidDesc: This trade link is invalid or corrupted.
trade.missingParam: This link is missing trade data. Ask your friend to generate the QR again.
trade.payloadTooLong: The list is too long to fit in a QR. Use Copy link and send via message instead.
trade.loginTitle: Log in to see the trade
trade.loginDesc: We compare the other person's list with your album. Your data stays on this device.
trade.emptyMatch: No direct match right now — your lists do not overlap for this swap.
trade.swapsOnlyBanner: This link carries their duplicate stickers. You'll see what you can receive; ask them to scan your QR too to figure out what you give.
trade.missingOnlyBanner: This link carries their missing stickers. You'll see what you can give; ask them to scan your QR too to figure out what you receive.
trade.generateHintBoth: We'll send both your duplicates and missing stickers. Whoever scans sees both sides of the trade.
trade.generateHintSwaps: Your lists don't fit together in one QR — we'll send only your duplicates. Whoever scans sees what they can receive from you; agree in person on what you get back.
trade.generateHintMissing: Your lists don't fit together in one QR — we'll send only your missing. Whoever scans sees what they can give you; agree in person on what you give back.
trade.emptyLists: Your album is complete — no duplicates or missing stickers to trade.
trade.scanHint: Point the camera at someone else's trade QR.
trade.scanCameraDenied: Camera access blocked. Paste the trade link below.
trade.scanInvalid: That's not a valid trade link.

paywall.tagline: Your assistant to complete the biggest World Cup sticker album

challenges.shareText: I completed the «{{title}}» challenge on Meu Álbum 2026! ⚽

host-trio.title: Host Nations
host-trio.description: Collect at least 1 sticker from each host nation: USA, Mexico, and Canada.

group-a-taste.title: Group A
group-a-taste.description: Have at least 1 sticker from every team in Group A.

oceania.title: Oceania
oceania.description: Collect at least 1 sticker from New Zealand and Australia.

south-america.title: South America
south-america.description: Have at least 1 sticker from every South American team (CONMEBOL).

europe-big5.title: European Giants
europe-big5.description: Collect at least 1 sticker from England, France, Germany, Spain, and Portugal.

asia-rising.title: Rising Asia
asia-rising.description: Collect at least 1 sticker from Japan, South Korea, Iran, and Qatar.

africa-united.title: United Africa
africa-united.description: Have at least 1 sticker from every African team (CAF).

last-champion.title: The Champion
last-champion.description: Collect at least 5 stickers from Argentina, the reigning world champions.

fwc-history.title: World Cup History
fwc-history.description: Collect every sticker in the World Cup history section (FWC 09–19).

five-continents.title: Five Corners of the World
five-continents.description: Have at least 1 sticker from one team on each continent.

complete-group-a.title: Group A Complete
complete-group-a.description: Collect every sticker from all four Group A teams.

halfway.title: Half Album
halfway.description: Collect 497 stickers — half of the full album.

full-album.title: Full Album
full-album.description: Collect all 994 stickers. The ultimate challenge.

all-champions.title: World Champions
all-champions.description: Complete 100% of the stickers for every World Cup champion nation in the album: BRA, GER, ARG, FRA, URU, ENG and ESP.

all-foil.title: FOIL Collection
all-foil.description: Collect all 130 special (foil) stickers in the album — the shiny stickers from every nation and the special sections.

grid.hint: Left-click to add · Right-click to remove

swaps.title: Swaps
swaps.emptyDesc: Keep collecting stickers and your extras will appear here.

login.tagline: Your assistant to complete the greatest World Cup sticker album of all time
login.description: Track your sticker collection for free. No passwords — just your email.
features: See your full list of missing stickers
Share what you're missing with friends via WhatsApp
See your duplicates and organize your swaps
login.linkSentTo: We sent a login link to
login.clickToSignIn: Click it to sign in — no password needed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.analyticsDescription: Anonymous usage analytics (Vercel and PostHog) and error monitoring (Sentry) run only with your consent.
settings.analyticsPageviewsNote: Pageviews on the landing and login pages are anonymous without an account. In the logged-in app, custom metrics and Sentry run only after you accept.
settings.importDiffChanged: Sticker slots with a different quantity: {{n}}
settings.importDiffAdded: Extra copies in the file vs now: {{n}}
settings.importDiffRemoved: Fewer copies in the file vs now: {{n}}
settings.importOverwriteNote: Import replaces your entire album in the cloud with the quantities from this file. This cannot be undone automatically.
settings.importConfirmDesc: Your current album will be overwritten with the imported file. Continue?
settings.importErrorEmpty: The file is empty or has no data rows.
settings.importErrorBadHeader: The CSV header does not match the app export format.
settings.importErrorBadColumnCount: A row does not have the expected number of columns.
settings.importErrorDuplicateId: The file lists the same sticker id more than once.
settings.importErrorBadId: A row is missing a sticker id.
settings.importErrorBadNumber: A sticker number in the file is not a valid integer.
settings.importErrorBadQuantity: A quantity in the file is not a valid non-negative integer.
settings.importErrorBadBoolean: The is_special column must be true or false.
settings.importErrorUnknownSticker: The file contains a sticker id that is not in this album catalog.
settings.importErrorCatalogMismatch: A row does not match the catalog (team, number, or type).
settings.importErrorGeneric: This file could not be read as a valid album CSV.
settings.importErrorRead: Could not read the selected file.
settings.importErrorNetwork: Could not save to the server. Check your connection and try again.
settings.savePointsHint: When you change the album, a CSV snapshot for today is kept on this device (last 30 days). Restoring uploads that snapshot to your account.
settings.savePointsEmpty: No automatic snapshots yet. They appear after you edit the album.
settings.savePointsDiffFor: Snapshot from {{date}} compared to your album now.
settings.savePointsRestoreDesc: Your current album will be replaced by the backup from {{date}}. Continue?
settings.savePointsDiffError: This snapshot is damaged or from another catalog version.
settings.resetConfirmDesc: This will set all sticker quantities to zero. Your account and login will remain. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountHint: Removes your account, login email, and all cloud album progress. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmDesc: All data for {{email}} will be erased. Type the phrase below to confirm.

missing.emptyDesc: Congratulations, you have all the stickers.

tradeChecker.title: Check trade match
tradeChecker.hint: Paste the WhatsApp list or type codes as AAA 00 (e.g. BRA 03 · ESP 12).
tradeChecker.invalidFormat: No stickers found in AAA 00 format (e.g. BRA 03 or BRA-03). Paste a duplicate list or codes separated by spaces or ·
tradeChecker.unknownTeams: Unrecognized team codes: {{teams}}. Check your paste.
tradeChecker.shareDetected: App share list detected — we only use sticker codes.
tradeChecker.selectHint: Tap to mark what you traded.
tradeChecker.detectedSwaps: Detected their duplicates — check the top side (+1).
tradeChecker.detectedMissing: Detected their missing list — check the bottom side (−1).
tradeChecker.giveCaution: Heads up: these leave your album.

sticker.removeDesc: This will mark it as not collected.

onboarding.label: Album first steps
onboarding.markFirstHint: Tap a sticker in the album to continue.

step1.title: Tap any sticker
step1.body: Mark the ones you already have. Tap the add button again to log duplicates.

step2.title: Share on WhatsApp
step2.body: On the Missing tab, send a formatted list to your group in one tap — flags included.

step3.title: Paste a trade list
step3.body: Got someone's duplicates? Paste here and the app matches what you still need.

step4.title: Your duplicates
step4.body: Everything extra lives on the Swaps tab — ready to share or trade.

step5.title: In-person trade via QR
step5.body: Meeting friends? Generate a QR with your swaps and compare on the spot.

step6.title: Track your progress
step6.body: Home shows how close you are to a full album and shortcuts to every tab.

step7.title: Themed challenges
step7.body: On Home you can track goals in progress. Tap see all for the full list and a shareable completion card.

step8.title: Ready to fill your album?
step8.body: Just keep tapping stickers. Every one counts — let's complete the World Cup set!

hero.subtitle: Track your stickers, share lists, and find swaps with friends — all on your phone, in real time, for free.

mark-fast.title: Mark in seconds
mark-fast.desc: Tap to add, tap to remove.
mark-fast.detail: No more spreadsheets, notebook photos, or outdated WhatsApp groups. One tap adds, another removes. Everything syncs to the cloud in real time — on any device.

whatsapp-share.title: Share on WhatsApp
whatsapp-share.desc: Your formatted list, ready to send.
whatsapp-share.detail: With one tap you send the group exactly what you're missing — with each team's flag emoji, organized by nation. No more guessing what you need.

paste-trades.title: Paste a swap list
paste-trades.desc: Instant match with a friend's duplicates.
paste-trades.detail: Got someone's duplicate list on WhatsApp? Paste it here. The app cross-checks with what you need and shows exactly who gives what — no spreadsheet, no confusion.

challenges.title: Themed challenges
challenges.desc: Goals that make collecting more fun.

milestones.title: Milestones & achievements
milestones.desc: Special cards to share your wins.

privacy.title: Privacy & data protection
privacy.subtitle: The app only collects what's needed to work. No selling data, no surprises.

encryption.text: Your data is stored in Supabase with encryption in transit and at rest

analytics.text: Anonymous analytics collected only with your consent

delete-account.text: Delete your account and data anytime, no hassle

lgpd.text: Operated in compliance with Brazil's LGPD data protection law

cta.title: Ready to build the most epic World Cup album?
cta.subtitle: Create your account in seconds with email or Google.

footer.disclaimer: Not affiliated with FIFA™, Panini™, or any of their subsidiaries. Independent fan project.

legal.version: Version 2026-05-12. Placeholder copy pending legal review.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Meu Álbum 2026 stores your account email and sticker collection progress in Supabase to sync your album across devices. We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.
privacy.data: Sub-processors used: Supabase (database and authentication — US/EU), Vercel (hosting — US), Google OAuth (authentication — optional). Anonymous usage analytics are collected only after explicit consent. Error monitoring may use Sentry with sanitized technical context when enabled.
privacy.rights: You have the right to access, correct, and export your data (Settings → Export CSV); request account and data deletion; and withdraw analytics consent at any time. To exercise these rights or for any privacy questions, contact us: hello@copa26web.app

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: The service is provided as-is for personal sticker collection management during the MVP phase.
terms.use: Do not misuse the service, attempt unauthorized access, or upload unlawful content through support channels.
terms.liability: The operator is not liable for album data loss beyond reasonable efforts to maintain cloud availability.

banner.text: Create a nickname to add friends and see trade suggestions!

nickname.title: Create nickname
nickname.hint: Your nickname is public and lets friends find you. You can change it anytime.
nickname.label: Nickname

profile.friendsOnly: Collection is visible to friends only.

trades.title: You can trade
trades.empty: No matches right now. Keep adding stickers!

sharing.rankingToggleHint: Your nickname and completion % are visible to everyone.
sharing.tradingToggleHint: Other users can see you as a trading partner.
sharing.emailToggleHint: Your email is never shown. You only receive contact from users who also opted in.
sharing.consentModalBody: If you enable it in Settings, your nickname and progress will appear in the ranking. Your duplicate and missing stickers may be visible for trade suggestions. Your email can be used to receive trade partner suggestions — never shared directly.

ranking.subtitle: Full collector leaderboard
ranking.noRankHint: Enable it in Settings to appear.
ranking.notOptedIn: You are not participating in the public ranking.
ranking.friendsEmptyState: None of your friends are in the ranking yet. Add friends to compare here!

tradingPartners.subtitle: Users you can trade with
tradingPartners.shareText: @{{nickname}} has {{m}} stickers you need and you have {{n}} they need. Let's trade! meualbum2026.app
tradingPartners.emptyState: No trade partners found right now.
tradingPartners.emptyHint: Keep adding stickers — when other users have duplicates you need, they'll show up here.
tradingPartners.notOptedIn: You are not visible for trade suggestions.
tradingPartners.shareDetailHeadline: ⚽ World Cup 2026 — want to trade stickers?
